name: NORTHROP GRUMMAN CORP /DE/
business: Northrop Grumman is a leading global aerospace and defense technology company delivering space systems, military aircraft, missile defense, advanced weapons, mission systems, networking, strategic deterrence, and breakthrough technologies such as advanced computing, microelectronics, and cyber. It serves U.S. and international customers, principally the U.S. Department of War and intelligence community.
sellsTo: international customers (including Japan, France, Australia, Republic of Korea, Poland)

exposures.sentence: The company is a leading provider of space systems, military aircraft, missile defense, advanced weapons and long-range fires capabilities, mission systems, networking and communications, strategic deterrence systems, and breakthrough technologies, such as advanced computing, microelectronics and cyber.

The company is a leading provider of space systems, military aircraft, missile defense, advanced weapons and long-range fires capabilities, mission systems, networking and communications, strategic deterrence systems, and breakthrough technologies, such as advanced computing, microelectronics and cyber.

The company is a leading provider of space systems, military aircraft, missile defense, advanced weapons and long-range fires capabilities, mission systems, networking and communications, strategic deterrence systems, and breakthrough technologies, such as advanced computing, microelectronics and cyber.

Major products and services include radar, electro-optical/infrared (EO/IR) and acoustic sensors; command, control, communications and computers, intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance (C4ISR) systems; electronic warfare systems; advanced communications and network systems; advanced microelectronics; navigation and positioning sensors; maritime power, propulsion and payload launch systems; full spectrum cyber solutions; and intelligence processing systems.
